title: Display & X11 (xrandr, xset)
html:
Display & X11 (xrandr, xset)

Contents

  • xrandr — list / change displays
  • xrandr — add a custom mode
  • DPI / scaling
  • Input / keyboard
  • Clipboard / screenshots
  • Window / display info
  • Persist xrandr setup (autorandr)

xrandr — list / change displays

CommandDescription
 
xrandr
list outputs + supported modes
xrandr --listmonitors
active monitors
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --auto
enable with preferred mode
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --off
disable an output
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --mode 1920x1080
set specific resolution
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --rate 60
set refresh rate
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --primary
set primary display
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --right-of eDP-1
place HDMI to the right of laptop screen
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --above eDP-1
stacked above
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --rotate left
rotate (left/right/inverted/normal)
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --scale 1.25x1.25
fractional scaling
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --brightness 0.7
software brightness (0.0-1.0)

xrandr — add a custom mode

For monitors whose native mode isn't auto-detected (e.g. odd resolutions, KVM-over-IP).

CommandDescription
 
cvt 2560 1440 60
compute modeline for 1440p@60
xrandr --newmode "2560x1440_60.00" 312.25 2560 2752 3024 3488 1440 1443 1448 1493 -hsync +vsync
register the modeline
xrandr --addmode HDMI-1 "2560x1440_60.00"
make available on output
xrandr --output HDMI-1 --mode "2560x1440_60.00"
use it

DPI / scaling

CommandDescription
 
xdpyinfo | grep -i dimension
screen size + DPI
xrandr --dpi 144
global software DPI
export GDK_SCALE=2
GTK integer scaling (Firefox, gedit)
export QT_SCALE_FACTOR=1.5
Qt fractional scaling

Input / keyboard

CommandDescription
 
setxkbmap -layout us
set keyboard layout
setxkbmap -layout us -variant intl
with variant
xmodmap -pk | head
show keycode→keysym
xev
live key/mouse event viewer
xset r rate 200 30
key repeat: 200ms delay, 30 hz
xset s off -dpms
disable screensaver + DPMS blanking
xset q
current xset state

Clipboard / screenshots

CommandDescription
 
xclip -selection clipboard
pipe stdin to clipboard
echo hi | xclip -sel c
short form
xclip -sel c -o
read clipboard to stdout
xsel --clipboard --input
alternative tool
scrot screen.png
fullscreen screenshot
scrot -s area.png
select region
flameshot gui
interactive screenshot tool
import -window root out.png
ImageMagick fullscreen capture

Window / display info

CommandDescription
 
xwininfo
click a window for its info
wmctrl -l
list all windows
xdotool getactivewindow
PID/window of focused window
xdotool key alt+Tab
send keystroke

Persist xrandr setup (autorandr)

CommandDescription
 
autorandr --save home
save current monitor profile as 'home'
autorandr --load home
autorandr --change
auto-pick profile based on connected monitors
